title: Pmw-Lwm
description:
adds mobile radar (protomanly weather mod required )
++ new stuff will be added over time
body:
The Mobile Radar is currently a Work in Progress, providing real-time data for storm chasers and weather enthusiasts.

Current Features:
Reflectivity Mode: View precipitation intensity.

Velocity Mode: Detect wind rotation and storm movement.

Planned Updates:
Tornado Paths: Coming in the next major update!

Customization: New color palettes are being developed.

Feedback & Suggestions:
Want specific colors added to the radar? Join the thread in ProtoManly’s Discord and leave a comment with your suggestions!
coming soon:
-radar upgrades
-recipes
